decisions.text: Pure HTML/CSS/vanilla JS, no build tools
All state changes via orchestrator commands, never hand-edited

recent_changes.author: orchestrator-init
recent_changes.summary: Initialized trial calculator project: 3 tasks (split, compete, collab), placeholder files created

recent_changes.author: orchestrator-init
recent_changes.summary: Updated acceptance checks: unary minus (task-01), flexible viewport (task-02), error handling (task-03)

recent_changes.summary: task-01 done: calculator engine merged to main, all 6 acceptance checks pass

recent_changes.author: Saurav
recent_changes.summary: Simplified trial to single compete task: all 3 build complete calculators independently

recent_changes.author: Saurav
recent_changes.summary: Removed compare-compete-task command and all heuristic scoring helpers; simplified to human review via set-winner only

recent_changes.author: Saurav
recent_changes.summary: Collapsed README to pure signpost, removed duplication with onboarding
